scene_description:
### Foreground (bottom to top of image)  
- **Cobblestone pavement**: Light gray, irregular stones forming the edge of the road on the left and right. The central section of the road is dark gray asphalt. The road slopes upward from foreground to background.  
- **Left building (ground floor, foreground)**: White facade with a ground-floor shop. The shop has a glass door (with a horizontal handle) and two large display windows. The window on the right shows a white shirt, pottery, and other items. The window on the left contains ceramics. The building’s facade is white, with a red brick wall above the ground floor. A wooden railing (horizontal planks) sits atop the brick wall.  
- **Circular sign (left mid-foreground)**: Mounted on the red brick wall. The sign is white with black Latin text “HUS” (all caps). It is circular, approx. 30–40 cm in diameter.  
- **Right building (ground floor, foreground)**: A low stone wall (irregular, gray stones) lines the right edge of the road. The building has a pale gray stone base, then light-colored horizontal siding (pale pink/beige). Two small rectangular windows with dark frames are on the building’s side facing the street.  

### Mid-ground (center to background)  
- **Road surface (center)**: Dark gray asphalt with no visible lane markings (no white/yellow lines). The road slopes upward, with the right side of the road (near the right building) having a slight incline.  
- **Parked vehicle (center-right mid-ground)**: A gray minivan parked on the right side of the road. The vehicle has a roof rack. No license plate is visible (angle/size prevents reading).  
- **Concrete barrier (left mid-background)**: A low, white concrete wall runs parallel to the road on the left side. It has a rectangular profile and is continuous along the slope.  
- **Utility pole (center background)**: A wooden pole with a horizontal crossbar, supporting multiple black wires running left to right. The pole is positioned behind the concrete barrier and in front of the trees.  

### Background  
- **Trees (center background, behind utility pole)**: Dense green foliage (deciduous) with no distinct tree types visible.  
- **Distant buildings (center background)**: Two white houses with dark sloped roofs. The house closest to the utility pole has multiple windows; the one further back has a similar roof style. Both sit on an elevated slope.  
- **Sky (upper portion of image)**: Clear blue sky with a few scattered white clouds.  

### Key Details (by category)  
- **TEXT & SIGNS**: Only the circular sign with “HUS” (Latin script) is visible. It is white with black text, mounted on the red brick wall (left mid-foreground).  
- **INFRASTRUCTURE**: One wooden utility pole (center background) with horizontal wires. A white concrete barrier (left mid-background) runs parallel to the road. No bollards, street lamps, traffic lights, fire hydrants, or guardrails are visible.  
- **VEHICLES & PLATES**: One gray minivan parked on the right side of the road (mid-ground); no license plate is readable.  
- **ROAD SURFACE & MARKINGS**: Dark gray asphalt road with no lane markings. The road slopes upward (right-hand traffic, as the vehicle is parked on the right).  
- **BUILDINGS & ARCHITECTURE**: Left building: white facade, red brick upper section, wooden railing, shop windows. Right building: light-colored siding, dark shingled roof, stone base, small windows. Distant buildings: white, dark sloped roofs.  
- **VEGETATION & TERRAIN**: Green trees/bushes in the background (deciduous). The terrain slopes upward (hilly), with the road ascending toward the background.

details.name: circular sign
details.reason: The text 'HUS' is visible, which means 'house' in several Scandinavian languages.
details.focused_description: A circular sign with a white background and dark text. The text reads "ANTIK & BRUKT" in a stylized font. The sign has a dark border (likely black or dark blue) and appears to be made of a rigid material. The text is in the Latin alphabet. The sign is circular in shape, with no visible damage in the crop.

details.name: red brick wall
details.reason: The combination of a white facade and red brick section is a specific architectural style.
details.focused_description: The red brick wall consists of rectangular bricks in varying shades of red, laid in a patterned arrangement with light-colored mortar between them. The bricks are uniform in size and the wall appears intact with no visible damage. The mortar lines are distinct, and the wall shows a consistent texture across its surface.

details.name: dark sloped roofs
details.reason: The style of the distant house roofs is a regional architectural clue.
details.focused_description: Dark sloped roofs with asphalt shingles in dark gray and dark red-brown. The shingles are small, overlapping, and arranged in a uniform pattern. The roofs have a consistent slope, appear intact with no visible damage, and no markings are present on the shingles.
